title: DASA Impact Report 2025
body: "The DASA Impact Report 2025 provides a detailed analysis of companies that have received DASA funding support. Using rigorous data collection and analysis methodologies, Beauhurst examines:   Post-funding investment patterns, including additional public and private equity investment secured by DASA-funded innovators Business outcomes including company exits, mergers, and acquisitions Employment growth and job creation across DASA-funded companies Economic contribution measured through Gross Value Added (GVA) Import and export activity of DASA-funded SMEs Regional distribution of DASA-supported innovation across the UK Sectoral analysis showing the range of technologies and industries receiving DASA support   "
